feedback.text: Hello, I believe video games are an important thing to consider during the Digital Fairness Act discussion. I myself had my copy of the game The Crew revoked due to the decision of the games publisher, Ubisoft. It should be clearly stated that when you buy a game, you actually just buy the license to play the game. Additionally, whenever a developer decides to abandon a game for whatever reason, the game itself should be made playable by the developer/ publisher after its abandonment.
